ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., microcontroller, sensor, display) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the component belongs to */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-category the component belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the component image */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the component datasheet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES component_sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES component_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for nested categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the sub-category belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., electrical, mechanical, thermal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the value belongs to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "typical_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log for the version */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Compatibility notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certifications of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_suppliers" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the component from the supplier */,
  "moq" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity (MOQ) for the component from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, procurement) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the component */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query made by the user */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., update, issue, alert) */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the note */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the note is about */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment made by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_notes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
